Why most products won’t take you from $1M to $2M on organic:

Organic only works for a specific kind of product, and most products aren’t it.

Think wearable blanket vs. regular blanket.
Think impossible non-stick pan vs. regular pan.

The second one in each pair works because it

The biggest mistake early-stage ecom founders make is thinking they have a platform problem.

They usually don’t.

They have a product problem.

If your product can’t work on Facebook, there’s a good chance it doesn’t have real demand yet.

tweets.text:
Simplest way to get better AI output: 
Use an RTF prompt.
 1. Role
2. Task
3. Format 

Give it a job title, tell it what to do, tell it how to format the output. This alone will improve everything you get from any LLM.

"Your role is copywriter, your task is to write an article,
